title: デビュー戦の後に・望むはティアラ

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet approaches the stands completely
out of breath.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... What are you getting so worked up for?
This is nothing for me.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'm the future number one, after all! What would I
do if I tripped up during my first race?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Let's get ready for the next one. We don't have
time to dawdle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet looks up at the digital track
display.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The entrants for the day's next debut race are
already listed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Those are names Daiwa Scarlet will be seeing in
future races—and only a small handful of the
racers she'll have to best on the way to the top.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Which means, our next step is obvious...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I'm going to enter the Tiara tour!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now comes the time to decide her tour—a crucial
choice that determines an Umamusume's future.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Triple Crown tour with the Satsuki Sho, the
Japanese Derby, and the Kikuka Sho... or the
Tiara tour with the Oka Sho, the Japanese Oaks,
and the Shuka Sho. Umamusume only get one
shot at either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Choosing which path to take is tantamount to
choosing one's destiny.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The most radiant Umamusume to date have all
come from the Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't that sound right up my alley? Both for
distance and elegance!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, then it's settled! My next race will be the
Tulip Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Tulip Sho is a renowned race known as the
gateway to success in the Oka Sho. A win there
will guarantee fair winds ahead.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I'm going to win. No matter who I'm up against.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If I'm going to be number one, I don't have time
to lose.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Isn't that right, Trainer?
choice_data_list: The Tulip Sho is as good as ours!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! First place is mine for the taking! I won't let
anyone else have it!
